title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Japanese Derby. Mihono Bourbon
remains calm and collected, despite the chanting
crowd calling her name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a rare display of ambition, Rice Shower
declares that she'll catch up to Mihono Bourbon
today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon remains unfazed by this and
stays focused on attaining victory. And so, the
curtain rises on the Japanese Derby...
